How to Improve Mental Health 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/howtoimprovementalhealth.html 
How to Improve Mental Health
Also called: Boost Emotional Wellness, Improve Emotional Health, Stay Positive 
Summary 
What is mental health? 
Mental health includes our emotional, psychological, and social well-being. It affects how we think, feel, and act as we cope with life. It also helps determine how we handle stress , relate to others, and make choices. Mental health is important at every stage of life, from childhood and the teen years through adultho
